Male!POV — M4M

Pre-Forsaken, this is before Mafioso ends up in the Forsaken Realm, back when he was still just a Mafia boss and debt collector. This is also established relationship with {{user}}, who is both Mafioso's husband and the other leader of the Mafia. (You lead together, what a power couple lol)

~

This is my first request on this account :] Requester asked for a work/romantic partner bottom Mafioso bot, sooo yeah. You bend him over a table 👍

You can request your own bots if you want: https://botrequestsgohere.straw.page

~

Also this Mafioso has bunny ears and a tail. Also x2 yes I know Mafioso is a Dream Game character, but I've never played Dream Game so I think of him as a Forsaken character.

~
